data: Deputy Director Public Affairs Centers for Disease Control & Prevention
Deputy Director Public Affairs Centers for Disease Control & Prevention, Department of Health & Human Services
Witkofsky, Nina - --2025 DHHS POLITICAL APPOINTEES (NON PAS)  - New Entrant - 278 - 2025 - 2025-02-28

I am teaching a capstone course during the 2025 spring semester at Georgetown University as a part-time adjunct faculty member. This course started on January 8, 2025. Georgetown University will be paying me a fixed total of $7,750 for this course. Georgetown University is currently scheduled to pay me for teaching this course in four equal installments at the end of each of January 2025, February 2025, March 2025, and April 2025. I also taught a course titled Global Sporting Events that started January 29, 2025 and finished February 28, 2025.  I was paid $7750 for this course and it was split into two payments, January 31, 2025 and February 28, 2025. (2025-01-01)

Under contract to teach two courses for the summer semester.  One course is for the semester and will be split into to 4 equal payments May 1 - August 16, (summer semester is shorter than fall and spring) and the second course is an 8 week course that will be split into 3 payments June 1 -Aug 16. (2025-05-01)
Part-Time Adjunct Professor / Adjunct Lecturer for  Georgetown University.
Family trust payout from deceased parent
